functions.name: session_register
functions.args: p_session_id TEXT, p_node_id TEXT, p_agent_id TEXT, p_claude_session_id TEXT, p_session_type TEXT, p_prompt TEXT, p_client_id TEXT, p_status TEXT, p_created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, p_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, p_caller_session_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL, p_notify_completion BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE

functions.name: session_get_all
functions.args: p_filters JSONB DEFAULT NULL, p_limit INTEGER DEFAULT NULL, p_offset INTEGER DEFAULT NULL

functions.name: event_append
functions.args: p_session_id TEXT, p_event_type TEXT, p_payload TEXT, p_searchable_text TEXT, p_created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, p_dedupe_key TEXT DEFAULT NULL

functions.name: event_read
functions.args: p_session_id TEXT, p_after_id INTEGER DEFAULT 0, p_limit INTEGER DEFAULT NULL, p_event_types TEXT[] DEFAULT NULL
functions.returns: TABLE( id INTEGER, session_id TEXT, event_type TEXT, payload JSONB, searchable_text TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: event_read_one
functions.returns: TABLE( id INTEGER, session_id TEXT, event_type TEXT, parent_event_id INTEGER, payload JSONB, searchable_text TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: events_viewport
functions.args: p_session_id TEXT, p_y_min BIGINT, p_y_max BIGINT
functions.returns: TABLE ( id INTEGER, parent_event_id INTEGER, event_type TEXT, depth INTEGER, y_start BIGINT, y_end BIGINT, payload JSONB )

functions.name: catalog_get_sessions
functions.returns: TABLE(session_id TEXT, folder_id TEXT, display_name TEXT)

functions.name: board_item_get_all
functions.returns: TABLE( id TEXT, folder_id TEXT, container_kind TEXT, container_id TEXT, membership_kind TEXT, source_runbook_item_id TEXT, item_type TEXT, item_id TEXT, x DOUBLE PRECISION, y DOUBLE PRECISION, metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: supervisor_event_append
functions.args: p_source_node TEXT, p_source_session_id TEXT, p_source_event_id INTEGER, p_event_type TEXT, p_payload TEXT, p_created_at TIMESTAMPTZ
functions.returns: TABLE( "offset" BIGINT, inserted BOOLEAN, contiguous_upto INTEGER, highest_seen_event_id INTEGER, gap_start INTEGER, gap_end INTEGER )

functions.name: supervisor_event_read_after
functions.args: p_after_offset BIGINT DEFAULT 0, p_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 100
functions.returns: TABLE( "offset" BIGINT, source_node TEXT, source_session_id TEXT, source_event_id INTEGER, event_type TEXT, payload JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, inserted_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: supervisor_source_cursor_get
functions.returns: TABLE( source_node TEXT, source_session_id TEXT, contiguous_upto INTEGER, highest_seen_event_id INTEGER, gap_start INTEGER, gap_end INTEGER, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: supervisor_source_cursor_set
functions.args: p_source_node TEXT, p_source_session_id TEXT, p_contiguous_upto INTEGER, p_highest_seen_event_id INTEGER, p_gap_start INTEGER DEFAULT NULL, p_gap_end INTEGER DEFAULT NULL
functions.returns: TABLE( source_node TEXT, source_session_id TEXT, contiguous_upto INTEGER, highest_seen_event_id INTEGER, gap_start INTEGER, gap_end INTEGER, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ )

functions.name: supervisor_registry_upsert
functions.args: p_role TEXT, p_active_session_id TEXT, p_epoch BIGINT, p_cursor_offset BIGINT, p_handover_state TEXT, p_cumulative_tokens BIGINT, p_compaction_count INTEGER, p_last_seen_at TIMESTAMPTZ
